ddls:
CREATE TABLE "traffic_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the traffic station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the traffic station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the traffic station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the traffic station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor used in the station (e.g., radar, camera) */,
  "lane_configuration" TEXT /* Configuration of lanes at the station (e.g., 2 lanes, 3 lanes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station collecting the data */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "collection_time" TEXT /* Time the data was collected */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the week (1-7) the data was collected */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day (0-23) the data was collected */,
  "n_high" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles traveling at high speed */,
  "n_med" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles traveling at medium speed */,
  "n_low" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles traveling at low speed */,
  "s_high" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles traveling at high speed in the southbound direction */,
  "s_med" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles traveling at medium speed in the southbound direction */,
  "s_low" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles traveling at low speed in the southbound direction */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of data collection (e.g., sunny, rainy) */,
  "road_conditions" TEXT /* Road conditions at the time of data collection (e.g., clear, congested) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES traffic_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_light_timings" (
  "timing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timing suggestion */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station the timing suggestion is for */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the week (1-7) the timing suggestion is for */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day (0-23) the timing suggestion is for */,
  "green_time" INTEGER /* Optimal green light time in seconds */,
  "yellow_time" INTEGER /* Optimal yellow light time in seconds */,
  "red_time" INTEGER /* Optimal red light time in seconds */,
  "optimization_algorithm" TEXT /* Optimization algorithm used to determine the timing suggestion (e.g., linear, quadratic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_light_timings_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES traffic_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the log entry was created */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Time the log entry was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout, update) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Log level of the entry (e.g., debug, info, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES system_users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data point */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station collecting the weather data */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the weather data was collected */,
  "collection_time" TEXT /* Time the weather data was collected */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the time of data collection */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the time of data collection */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed at the time of data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES traffic_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "road_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each road condition data point */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station collecting the road condition data */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the road condition data was collected */,
  "collection_time" TEXT /* Time the road condition data was collected */,
  "road_surface" TEXT /* Road surface conditions at the time of data collection (e.g., wet, dry) */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility at the time of data collection (e.g., clear, foggy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_road_conditions_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES traffic_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic incident data point */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station collecting the traffic incident data */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the traffic incident data was collected */,
  "collection_time" TEXT /* Time the traffic incident data was collected */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of traffic incident (e.g., accident, roadwork) */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Description of the traffic incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_incidents_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES traffic_stations ("station_id")
)
